text.title: Enterprise XR Applications Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Enterprise XR Applications to a concrete case.

section.title: Mining machine-operator training

example.code: Use case: training-simulation. Coverage: 72% headsets in workforce; procurement to 90% by Q4. Comfort: 25 min continuous + 5 min break; vestibular-safe (no artificial locomotion). IT: Okta SSO + Intune MDM; ≤30 ms session latency; offline mode for remote sites. Security: room scan 30 d retention; recordings encrypted + 90 d retention; consent flow at session start. ROI: baseline $12k/hr machine downtime training → target 30% reduction in time-to-competence; measured by pre/post assessment + downtime tracking.

section.note: Every gate documented with concrete values; ready for pilot.
